_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "bash: unique-test-command-xyz123" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for a completed tool call (data-testid "tool-call-completed") to appear. The bash tool command element (".bash-tool-command") should be visible and contain the text "unique-test-command-xyz123".
